title: After Caesar Falls
description: On pages 6–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #7. The central beat is after caesar falls.
scene: The scene focuses on after caesar falls, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Zoro! Turn around! The other way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Of course, just leave it to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Mochya!! Hang in there!! We're gonna escape

summary: After Caesar Falls. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
